service.name: Replicate API
service.description_for_ai: Run 1000+ open-source AI models via API. Images, video, audio, text, 3D. Includes Flux, SDXL, Llama, Whisper, LLaVA and many more. Pay per second of compute. Best for accessing specialized models.

auth.cost: Pay per second. Varies by model.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Run 1000+ open-source AI models via API. Images, video, audio, text, 3D. Includes Flux, SDXL, Llama, Whisper, LLaVA and many more. Pay per second of compute. Best for accessing specialized models. Run any model on Replicate by owner/model name. Returns output synchronously or as prediction ID for async.

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

agent_hints.async: Large models return prediction ID — poll GET /predictions/{id} for result.
